slug.title: Slug
slug.description: URL-friendly identifier. Must start with a letter. Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only. Cannot be changed once set.

model.title: AI Model
model.description: Select the LLM for your agent. Note that each LLM has its specific advantages, behaviour and cost.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.description: Tell the agent what's its purpose and what needs should it serve.

errorMessage.pattern: Level 1 and 2 headings (# and ##) are not allowed. Please use level 3+ headings (###, ####, etc.) instead.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: Tell the agent what personality it should have and how it should communicate with the users.

errorMessage.pattern: Level 1 and 2 headings (# and ##) are not allowed. Please use level 3+ headings (###, ####, etc.) instead.

principles.title: Principles
principles.description: Tell the agents what it should and shouldn't do when it interacts with users or skills.

errorMessage.pattern: Level 1 and 2 headings (# and ##) are not allowed. Please use level 3+ headings (###, ####, etc.) instead.

prompt.title: Knowledge Base
prompt.description: Give the agent any additional knowledge. Text only.

errorMessage.pattern: Level 1 and 2 headings (# and ##) are not allowed. Please use level 3+ headings (###, ####, etc.) instead.

prompt_append.title: Advanced
prompt_append.description: Additional system prompt that has higher priority than initial system prompt, only some models support this, if not supported, this part will append to the end of initial system prompt

errorMessage.pattern: Level 1 and 2 headings (# and ##) are not allowed. Please use level 3+ headings (###, ####, etc.) instead.

temperature.title: Temperature
temperature.description: Controls creativity: higher values are more creative, lower values are more precise. CHANGING THIS SETTING MAY INTRODUCE UNEXPECTED BEHAVIOR. USE WITH CAUTION.

frequency_penalty.title: Frequency Penalty
frequency_penalty.description: Adjusts repetition: higher values encourage new topics, lower values allow repetition.

presence_penalty.title: Presence Penalty
presence_penalty.description: Controls topic focus: higher values promote diversity, lower values stay closely on topic.

telegram_entrypoint_enabled.title: Enable Telegram Communication
telegram_entrypoint_enabled.description: Allow agent to respond to Telegram messages

token.title: Bot Token
token.description: Telegram bot token obtained from BotFather

owner.title: Owner Username
owner.description: Owner of the bot, if set, you can receive notifications from the bot

whitelist_chat_ids.title: Whitelist Chat IDs
whitelist_chat_ids.description: List of chat IDs that are allowed to interact with the bot

greeting_user.title: User Greeting
greeting_user.description: Custom greeting message for individual users

search_internet.title: Internet Search
search_internet.description: Enable LLM native internet search for this agent

super_mode.title: Super Mode
super_mode.description: Enable super mode with higher recursion limit for this agent

enable_todo.title: Todo List
enable_todo.description: Enable todo list for task planning and tracking in complex multi-step tasks

enable_activity.title: Activity Publishing
enable_activity.description: Enable activity skills (create activity, recent activities)

enable_post.title: Post Publishing
enable_post.description: Enable post skills (create post, get post, recent posts)

enable_long_term_memory.title: Long-Term Memory
enable_long_term_memory.description: Enable long-term memory that persists across conversations

sub_agents.title: Sub-Agents
sub_agents.description: List of sub-agent IDs or slugs that this agent can call using the call_agent skill. Only listed agents can be called.

sub_agent_prompt.title: Sub-Agent Instructions
sub_agent_prompt.description: Additional instructions for how the agent should use its sub-agents

errorMessage.pattern: Level 1 and 2 headings (# and ##) are not allowed. Please use level 3+ headings (###, ####, etc.) instead.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: Please choose the Agent's skills carefully. Excessive skills will pollute the context and reduce the Agent's intelligence. Only select the necessary skills, and it is best not to exceed 10.

autonomous.title: Autonomous

id.title: ID
id.description: Unique identifier for the autonomous configuration

description.title: Description
description.description: Briefly describe what this automation does

cron.title: Schedule
cron.description: Advanced scheduling (cron format), mutually exclusive with minutes

trigger_type.title: Trigger Type
trigger_type.description: Whether this task runs on a schedule or from Xian events.

xian_event.title: Xian Event Trigger
xian_event.description: Xian indexed event configuration for near-real-time triggers.

contract.title: Contract
contract.description: Exact Xian contract name to monitor.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Optional exact-match filters on the merged event payload.

cooldown_seconds.title: Cooldown Seconds
cooldown_seconds.description: Minimum time between successful trigger executions.

prompt.title: Task Prompt
prompt.description: Prompt the agent will execute when the schedule or trigger fires.

has_memory.title: Has Memory
has_memory.description: Whether to retain conversation memory between autonomous runs. If disabled, thread memory is cleared before each run.

autonomous.description: Set automated prompts that run either on a cron schedule or from Xian event triggers.

wallet_provider.title: Wallet Provider
wallet_provider.description: Provider of the agent's wallet, choose cdp if you want the agent to have it's own wallet.

network_id.title: Default Network
network_id.description: Default Network, please note that some CDP Wallet native skills like swap only support the base network.

readonly_wallet_address.title: Readonly Wallet Address
readonly_wallet_address.description: Set the wallet address as agent wallet, then it can only be analyzed by the agent.
